config.conformancepack.ConformancePackNa.Description: Name of the conformance pack you want to create.

config.conformancepack.DeliveryS3Bucket.Description: The name of the Amazon S3 bucket where AWS Config stores conformance pack templates.

config.conformancepack.DeliveryS3KeyPref.Description: The prefix for the Amazon S3 bucket.

config.conformancepack.TemplateBody.Description: A string containing full conformance pack template body. Structure containing the template body with a minimum length of 1 byte and a maximum length of 51,200 bytes.  You can only use a YAML template with two resource types: config rule (`AWS::Config::ConfigRule`) and a remediation action (`AWS::Config::RemediationConfiguration`).

config.conformancepack.TemplateS3Uri.Description: Location of file containing the template body (s3://bucketname/prefix). The uri must point to the conformance pack template (max size: 300 KB) that is located in an Amazon S3 bucket.  You must have access to read Amazon S3 bucket.
